_comments: CSP: script-src includes 'unsafe-inline' — known Vite limitation (inline module bootstrap), accepted risk.
CSP: Clerk domains: https://*.clerk.accounts.dev (dev), https://*.clerk.com (Clerk CDN), https://clerk.cacatraca.omnipotency.ai (production custom domain).
CSP: All AI calls go through Convex actions — no direct browser-to-OpenAI connections needed.
Permissions-Policy: microphone=(self) is intentional — required for the planned voice logging feature.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.clerk.accounts.dev https://*.clerk.com https://clerk.cacatraca.omnipotency.ai; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.convex.cloud https://*.convex.site wss://*.convex.cloud wss://*.convex.site https://*.clerk.accounts.dev https://*.clerk.com https://clerk.cacatraca.omnipotency.ai; frame-src 'self' https://*.clerk.accounts.dev https://*.clerk.com https://clerk.cacatraca.omnipotency.ai; worker-src 'self' blob:; manifest-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
